name: Brioche - Great Chefs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the flour, sugar, yeast and salt. Blend well.
2. Add eggs and continue mixing until dough is smooth.
3. Add butter in 4 stages, working each piece into the dough before adding more.
4. Continue mixing until dough is very elastic and clings to the spoon.
5. Cover with plastic wrap and chill for six hours.
6. Unwrap the dough and cut it in half. Shape each half into a ball.
7. Work each ball into a loaf using the palm of your hand. Place each loaf in a clean loaf pan and let stand in a warm spot.
8. When the dough has become slightly puffy, gently deflate with hands.
9. Allow the dough to rise again until it reaches the top of the pan.
10. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for about 45 minutes, until the dough pulls away from the sides of the pan and is golden brown.
11. Turn loaves out of the pans and let them cool on a wire rack.
